'''sodhazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadable|wadable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadable|wadable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sodhazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sodhazhithi|sodhazhithi]] || [[word:sodhazhiji|sodhazhiji]] || [[word:sodhazhishi|sodhazhishi]] || [[word:sodhazhiki|sodhazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sodhazhuthuthu|sodhazhuthuthu]] || [[word:sodhazhujuju|sodhazhujuju]] || [[word:sodhazhushushu|sodhazhushushu]] || [[word:sodhazhukuku|sodhazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sodhazhuthu|sodhazhuthu]] || [[word:sodhazhuju|sodhazhuju]] || [[word:sodhazhushu|sodhazhushu]] || [[word:sodhazhuku|sodhazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sodhazhufthuf|sodhazhufthuf]] || [[word:sodhazhufjuf|sodhazhufjuf]] || [[word:sodhazhufshuf|sodhazhufshuf]] || [[word:sodhazhufkuf|sodhazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sodhazhethe|sodhazhethe]] || [[word:sodhazheje|sodhazheje]] || [[word:sodhazheshe|sodhazheshe]] || [[word:sodhazheke|sodhazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sodhazhothotho|sodhazhothotho]] || [[word:sodhazhojojo|sodhazhojojo]] || [[word:sodhazhoshosho|sodhazhoshosho]] || [[word:sodhazhokoko|sodhazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sodhazhotho|sodhazhotho]] || [[word:sodhazhojo|sodhazhojo]] || [[word:sodhazhosho|sodhazhosho]] || [[word:sodhazhoko|sodhazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sodhazhofthof|sodhazhofthof]] || [[word:sodhazhofjof|sodhazhofjof]] || [[word:sodhazhofshof|sodhazhofshof]] || [[word:sodhazhofkof|sodhazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|sodhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŠthĂŠ|sodhazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŠjĂŠ|sodhazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŠshĂŠ|sodhazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sodhazhĂŠkĂŠ|sodhazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sodhazhathatha|sodhazhathatha]] || [[word:sodhazhajaja|sodhazhajaja]] || [[word:sodhazhashasha|sodhazhashasha]] || [[word:sodhazhakaka|sodhazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sodhazhatha|sodhazhatha]] || [[word:sodhazhaja|sodhazhaja]] || [[word:sodhazhasha|sodhazhasha]] || [[word:sodhazhaka|sodhazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sodhazhafthaf|sodhazhafthaf]] || [[word:sodhazhafjaf|sodhazhafjaf]] || [[word:sodhazhafshaf|sodhazhafshaf]] || [[word:sodhazhafkaf|sodhazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sodhazhasha|sodhazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sodhazhshĂ«sha|sodhazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sodhazhrosha|sodhazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sodhazhmusha|sodhazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sodhazhyasha|sodhazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosodhazhnkshĂ«sha|gosodhazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosodhazhnkrosha|gosodhazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosodhazhnkmusha|gosodhazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosodhazhnkyasha|gosodhazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sodhadhazhasha|sodhadhazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sodhadhazhshĂ«sha|sodhadhazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sodhadhazhrosha|sodhadhazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sodhadhazhmusha|sodhadhazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sodhadhazhyasha|sodhadhazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosodhadhazhnkshĂ«sha|gosodhadhazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosodhadhazhnkrosha|gosodhadhazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosodhadhazhnkmusha|gosodhadhazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosodhadhazhnkyasha|gosodhadhazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sedhĂŠzhasha|sedhĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sedhĂŠzhshĂ«sha|sedhĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sedhĂŠzhrosha|sedhĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sedhĂŠzhmusha|sedhĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sedhĂŠzhyasha|sedhĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosedhĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gosedhĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosedhĂŠzhnkrosha|gosedhĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosedhĂŠzhnkmusha|gosedhĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosedhĂŠzhnkyasha|gosedhĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sodhfazhasha|sodhfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sodhfazhshĂ«sha|sodhfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sodhfazhrosha|sodhfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sodhfazhmusha|sodhfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sodhfazhyasha|sodhfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosodhfazhnkshĂ«sha|gosodhfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosodhfazhnkrosha|gosodhfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosodhfazhnkmusha|gosodhfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosodhfazhnkyasha|gosodhfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
